summary.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Seat and rudder pedal adjustment, fuel management panel, pilot instrument panel, engine 
instruments and switches, center instrument panel, annunciator panel analysis, right seat 
instrument panel, circuit breaker panels, control pedestal, overhead control panel, MFD, 
checklists: before start, engine start, after start, brake check (out of chocks), engine run-up, 
takeoff, after landing, and secure

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Takeoff procedures, checklist management, landing procedures, checklists: climb, cruise, 
descent, approach, landing, start malfunctions, and MFD operations, CRM callouts, and 
pressurization system malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Loss of brakes, hot brakes, brake fire, mechanical stops in throttle quadrant, inadvertent 
condition lever to fuel cutoff, engine failure at altitude, anti-ice and deice systems autopilot 
disengagement, and ground emergencies, anti-ice and deice systems, and windshield heating 
failure
topics:
inadvertent 
condition lever to fuel cutoff

anti-ice and deice systems autopilot 
disengagement

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Vmca demo, dynamic engine cut, engine failure or fire during or after takeoff, fuel system 
malfunctions, smoke or fume emergencies, in-flight damage, bird strikes, wing or 
uncontrollable fire, ditching
topics: engine failure or fire during or after takeoff

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Flap malfunctions, no-flap landings, gear malfunctions, unsafe gear and gear up landings, 
engine malfunctions, propeller malfunctions, electrical malfunctions, and air-starts
topics: unsafe gear and gear up landings

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Basic air work, high-work maneuvers, landing patterns, and checklist 
management

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Outside scan techniques, see and avoid, takeoff, crosswind takeoff and landing, aborted 
takeoff, landing pattern, full-stop landings, touch-and-go procedures, training-time-out, 
NATOPS brief, dual engine wave-offs, aircraft engine operating limits, engine start 
procedures, abnormal starts and malfunctions, and brake system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Porpoised landings, aircraft airframe operating limits, full-flap landings, engine fire on deck, 
MFD operation, stalls and spin recovery, no-flap landings, ditching power-on, and fuel 
system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Lost communications (VFR), smoke and fire of unknown origin, oxygen system use, 
emergency descent, smoke and fume elimination, and electrical system and malfunctions.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
IV-9
topics: smoke and fire of unknown origin

and electrical system and malfunctions.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
IV-9

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Engine system and malfunctions, engine failure during take-off, right-hand pattern, and night 
or IMC ditch versus day VMC ditch
topics:
and night 
or IMC ditch versus day VMC ditch

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Emergency procedures, simulated emergency scenarios, CRM during 
simulated emergencies, dynamic engine cut, SSE pattern work, and SSE 
(landings, wave-offs, touch-and-go), landing gear system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Maintaining aircraft control during emergencies, pattern considerations, 
communications, and CRM

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
CRM, pilot monitoring responsibilities, and touch-and-go abort decisions. 
Operation limits quiz and RDO briefing
topics:
and touch-and-go abort decisions. 
Operation limits quiz and RDO briefing

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Night flying environment, field lighting, aircraft lighting, observer duties, 
outside scan techniques, see and avoid, porpoised landing, CRM guidelines and callouts, and 
night instrument approaches

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Local operations, right-hand pattern and CRM night or IMC ditching, 
runway/taxiway/parking signs and symbols, runway markings, and night visual approaches
topics: right-hand pattern and CRM night or IMC ditching

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText: Aircraft operating limits, CRM guidelines/callouts

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Instrument crosscheck, instrument takeoff, full-panel approach-to-stalls, stalls and spin 
recovery, high work maneuvers, and control and performance concept

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Unusual attitudes, pitot-static system, flight instrument characteristics, ESIS operation, wet 
compass characteristics, and departure procedures

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Anti-icing system, emergency or minimum fuel state, TERPs, IFR En route Supplement, 
Flight Information Handbook, NOTAMs, and autopilot/flight director usage

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
IAF and FAF procedures (6T’s, descent, and lead turns), CRM callouts and techniques, GCA 
approach, PAR, ASR, and ILS configuration point, ASR recommended altitudes, NAVAID 
setup (takeoff, en route, approach, and missed approach), cockpit procedures (en route versus 
multiple terminal approaches, task management), and point-to-point navigation
topics:
cockpit procedures (en route versus 
multiple terminal approaches

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Holding, missed approach holding versus HILO procedures, VOR and TAC approach 
procedures, missed approach, circling procedures, circling missed approach (determining 
MAP and continuation beyond MAP), needle-only approach procedures, and continuous 
descent final approach (CDFA)
topics: missed approach holding versus HILO procedures

circling missed approach (determining 
MAP and continuation beyond MAP)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
NATOPS Instrument Flight Manual, SOPs, local instructions, NATOPS, LOC and LOC-BC 
approaches (configuration, presentation, MA, and FAF Identification by other than DME), 
ESIS procedures, reverse sensing, and TERPS
topics: and FAF Identification by other than DME)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
RNAV(GPS) approach types (LNAV, LNAV/VNAV, LPV, TAA, T’s, and HILO), feeder fix 
selection of IAF, RNAV configuration point, RAIM, GPS sensitivity modes, autopilot and 
flight director, lost communications (FIH and LOA) , and SSE approach procedures.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-6
topics:
and SSE approach procedures.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-6

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Holding, GCA approach, PAR, ILS, and ASR configuration point, PAR versus ASR descent 
point, ASR recommended altitudes, NAVAID characteristics (ILS, LOC, LOC-BC (service 
volumes, operation principles, NATOPS procedures, and cockpit presentation)), ATC 
communication (clearance delivery, ground, tower, center, approach, tower, and ground), 
uncontrolled airfields (communications, canceling IFR, and procedures), holding in lieu of 
(HILO) PT approach, approach plate titles and notes, ATIS, AWOS, and ASOS, DD-175-1, 
and terminal area delay DD-1801
topics:
holding in lieu of 
(HILO) PT approach

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Procedure turns (methods and types), instrument publications (DoD (NGA), FAA (NACO), 
Jeppesen, other), DPs (ODP, SID,vector, diverse, and uncontrolled field), VDP, CDFA, 
landing transition, low close-in obstacles, ILS, LOC, LOC-BC approach (configuration, 
presentation, MA, and FAF identification by other than DME), reverse sensing, and stopover 
DD-1801
topics: and FAF identification by other than DME)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Point-to-point navigation; TERPS required obstacle clearance (ROC) for initial, intermediate, 
final, and circling phases; NAVAID characteristics (VOR, TACAN, and NDB 
(service volumes, operation principles, NATOPS procedures, and cockpit presentation)); 
VOR, TAC, and NDB approach procedures; missed approach (determining MAP and 
continuation beyond MAP), circling procedures and circling missed approach; procedure track 
(arc and radial combination and teardrop); VDP; and RNAV (FMS, GPS, DME/DME, 
VOR/DME, and INS), and FAA flight plan.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-10
topics: TERPS required obstacle clearance (ROC) for initial

missed approach (determining MAP and 
continuation beyond MAP)
circling procedures and circling missed approach

procedure track 
(arc and radial combination and teardrop)

and FAA flight plan.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-10

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Pilot-controlled lighting; lost communications (FIH and LOA) (IFR – VMC versus IMC); 
wind shear; visual approach; contact approach; ESIS approach procedures; needle only 
approach procedures; SSE approach procedures; TERPS (FAA Order 8260.3B); Trouble T 
(OIS, low close-in obstacles, climb gradients, alternate routing, nonstandard takeoff weather 
minimums, and VCOA)
topics: lost communications (FIH and LOA) (IFR – VMC versus IMC)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
SSE approach procedures, SSE circling approach, procedure track (arc and radial combination 
and teardrop), emergency voice reports , departure procedures (SID, ODP, vector, diverse) 
and avionics system and malfunctions
topics:
procedure track (arc and radial combination 
and teardrop)

diverse) 
and avionics system and malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Weather filing criteria, turbulence and wind shear, icing, approach and landing minimums, 
ESIS approach, fuel system and malfunctions, in-flight damage and bird strikes

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
En route weather filing facilities (FSS and PMSV), STARS (filing, planning, and lost 
comms), SSE missed approach, and electrical system and malfunctions
topics: En route weather filing facilities (FSS and PMSV)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
SSE configuration point with or without VNAV, flight director malfunctions, autopilot 
malfunctions and disconnect procedures, landing gear system and malfunctions, and propeller 
system and malfunctions
topics: SSE configuration point with or without VNAV

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
SSE approach procedures (configuration, airspeeds and power in the descent, and descent 
rate), SSE circling approach and missed approach, emergency voice reports, propeller system 
and malfunctions, in-flight damage and bird strikes, ESIS approach, and simulated versus 
actual EP.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-16
topics: airspeeds and power in the descent
SSE circling approach and missed approach

and simulated versus 
actual EP.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
 
V-16

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Needle only VOR and TAC approach procedures, landing minimums, flight director 
malfunctions, autopilot malfunctions and disconnect procedures, electrical system and 
malfunctions, anti-ice and deice system, windshield heating, and flight control system and 
malfunctions
topics: Needle only VOR and TAC approach procedures

and flight control system and 
malfunctions

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Procedure track (arc and radial combination and teardrop), VDP, CDFA, smoke and fume 
emergencies, smoke and fire of unknown origin, avionics system and malfunctions, and 
airfield diagrams and symbols
topics: Procedure track (arc and radial combination and teardrop)
smoke and fire of unknown origin

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Hazardous weather, pitot static system and malfunctions (alternate static and related avionics 
equipment), engine system and malfunctions (engine failure or fire after takeoff), STAR 
(filing, planning, and lost comms), fuel planning (required totals and reserve, and NATOPS 
performance information), fuel system and malfunctions, brake system and malfunctions, 
wake turbulence, wind shear, PULL UP warning, and weight and balance form F
topics:
pitot static system and malfunctions (alternate static and related avionics 
equipment)
engine system and malfunctions (engine failure or fire after takeoff)
and weight and balance form F

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Operations limits quiz, IAF/FAF entry procedures (6 T’s, descent, and lead 
turns), pressurization system and malfunctions, electrical system, and CNAF-M 3710.7 weather 
filing criteria

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
CRM Seven Skills, callouts, ATC communications (clearance delivery, ground, tower, center, 
approach, tower, and ground), pre-flight planning (nav bag, fuel planning and packet, weight 
and balance, NOTAMS (destination, alternates, and en route), CNAF-M 3710.7 weather filing 
criteria, DD-1801, DD-175-1, OPARS, AIRMETs, and SIGMETs), unfamiliar field 
operations, and MFD operation

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
DPs (ODP, SID, vector, diverse), checklist management, en route charts, airfield markings 
and lighting, STARs (filing, planning, and lost comms), en route weather facilities 
(FSS and Metro), airport diagrams and symbols, circling and circling missed approach (TAS 
considerations), securing and RON procedures
topics:
en route weather facilities 
(FSS and Metro)

circling and circling missed approach (TAS 
considerations)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
FAA flight plan, contacting FSS, performance data, anti-icing systems, RNP, lost 
communications (en route, VMC versus IMC), and course deviations for weather

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Filing in-flight, SSE en route, FMS en route navigation, wake turbulence, arrival transition, 
and procedure turn (holding technique)

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Vmca, Vmcg, PIC decision making, WW versus convective SIGMET, weather considerations 
during emergencies, approach lighting, weight and balance form F, and other discussion items 
at the discretion of the IP
topics:
and other discussion items 
at the discretion of the IP

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Memory items and deferred emergencies, NATOPS Procedures and situations not covered by 
NATOPS, changing flight plan in-flight, ATC priority handling, adaptability/flexibility during 
emergencies, and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP.

CNATRAINST 1542.175D 
10 Jul 2025 
V-24
topics:
NATOPS Procedures and situations not covered by 
NATOPS

and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP.

items.discussText:
Airspace and RVSM, weight and balance form F, “land as soon as practicable versus 
possible,” RNP, and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP
topics:

possible,” RNP
and other discussion items at the discretion of the IP

items.discussText:
Student brief CRM case study, threat and error management, CRM, ORM, and other 
discussion items at the discretion of the IP
topics:
and other 
discussion items at the discretion of the IP

items.curriculumTitle: T-44C E-2D INTERMEDIATE MULTI-SERVICE PILOT TRAINING SYSTEM (MPTS) MASTER CURRICULUM GUIDE
items.discussText:
Density altitude considerations (true airspeed, descents required, and circling rate of turn), 
instrument rating request form CNAF-M 3710.7 and other discussion items at the discretion 
of the IP
topics:
instrument rating request form CNAF-M 3710.7 and other discussion items at the discretion 
of the IP

items.discussText:
Instrument rating request form CNAF-M 3710.7, Trouble T 
(OIS, low close-in obstacles, climb gradients, alternate routing, nonstandard takeoff weather 
minimums, and VCOA), operations limits quiz, and additional discussion items at the discretion 
of the IP
topics:

items.discussText:
Formation flight procedures, flight sequence, and formation emergency 
procedures
